narrative:
Jackson Township (precinct in Pickaway County) has 815 registered voters, with 46.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 43.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 34.1 percentage points.
